allegheny_dog_licenses.csv — data overview

Data Dictionary
Description:This dataset contains 50,013 records of dog licensing information from a U.S. jurisdiction. Each record is identified by a unique surrogate numeric ID and includes details such as the type of license, breed, color, name, owner's ZIP code, an expiration year (uniformly set to 2099), and the timestamp when the record entered the system. The data span more than two decades (2003‑2026) for record validity dates, but most records cluster early in that period. While a few fields contain missing values (e.g., 1 breed entry and 50 color entries), the dataset is otherwise complete, with no duplicate IDs.
Rows:50,013
Columns:8
Completeness:100.0%
